Subject: Pro-tip: clear out your tabs by saving them in Pocket

Save time with the Pocket button

While browsing on your computer, you can save any page you come
across right to your library.

Install Now 
( https://clicks.getpocket.com/f/a/SFZw7c4csi8PowPW17SDJQ~~/AAQRxQA~/RgRoB8zBP0RoaHR0cHM6Ly9nZXRwb2NrZXQuY29tL2FkZD91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cG9ja2V0JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yZWVuZ2FnZSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1leHRlbnNpb25XA3NwY0IKZiHBRyVmK1J6U1IXZW1pbC5za29nc3VuZEBnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAcw~ )
